title: 1,000 days of Annavaasal: Erode’s dusk meal mission feeds over 2.5 lakh people
content: Every evening between 6 p.m. and 6.30 p.m., volunteers serve idlis with kurma. Depending on sponsors’ contributions, items such as chapati, tomato rice, fruits, biscuits, and eggs are also provided. On average, about 250 people are fed daily

title: No secret meeting took place with Uddhav Thackeray, says Devendra Fadnavis
content: A media house had claimed that Devendra Fadnavis and Uddhav Thackeray met on April 22, 2026, at midnight at the Chief Minister's official residence, 'Varsha', in Mumbai

title: AAP no longer the same party, no one can work with Kejriwal, says Swati Maliwal
content: Swati Maliwal, who joined the BJP after defecting, praised the "decisive and strong leadership" of Prime Minister Narendra Modi

title: Kerala in action mode to mitigate rising heat impact
content: District collectors have been instructed to take necessary steps and seek the opinion of police and traffic authorities regarding reducing the duration of traffic signals wherever possible

title: AAP to write to Rajya Sabha chairman for defected MPs’ disqualification
content: “Anti-defection law clearly states that any type of split or faction cannot happen in the Rajya Sabha and Lok Sabha. It does not carry any legal recognition, even if it's a two-thirds majority,”  Mr. Singh said

title: PM Modi calls Jadavpur University place of ‘anarchy’; Mamata defends, calls it ‘democracy in motion’
content: Professors, academics, and civil society members express disappointment over PM Modi’s attack on the premium institute

title: Four charred to death in fire at scrap godown in Rajasthan
content: The incident occurred in the Neemrana area on April 24 night Superintendent of Police Satvir Singh said police recovered four charred bodies late at night and sent them for post-mortem

title: Karnataka internal quota: Cabinet clears sub-classification within 15% for Scheduled Castes
content: The matrix with provides for 5.25% each to Category 1 and Category 2 and 4.5% to Category 3; Chief Minister calls it a ‘historic’ and unanimous decision of Cabinet

title: India’s butterfly boom: How Nature walks, parks, and trails are sparking a new conservation movement
content: From Bengaluru’s urban forests to the Northeast’s biodiversity hotspots, enthusiasts and experts are turning butterfly-watching into a powerful gateway to ecology, education, and sustainable travel

title: Thrissur Pooram: Railways to operate special trains to Thrissur from southern Kerala
content: “In view of Thrissur Pooram, the unreserved MEMU special trains will be operated between Kollam Junction and Thrissur on April 26 to ensure convenient travel for passengers,” says release issued by railways

title: Kochi’s historic Kokers Theatre set for demolition with an estimate of ₹19.54 lakh
content: The estimate has been prepared on the basis of a survey assessing demolition costs and the valuation of saleable debris

title: Siddhartha Das Studio draws from Odisha’s temple architecture and stepwells in modern design
content: Designer and curator Siddhartha Das is inspired by third spaces in ancient India. An exhibition in New Delhi showcases craft, memory and material in his practise

title: Assam-born writer-actor’s film screened at international festival in Mexico
content: Rajdeep Choudhury is the writer and lead actor of ‘A Teacher’s Gift’ directed by Artur Ribeiro of Portugal

title: Steps taken to ensure there is no shortage of fuel: Collector Rajakumari Ganiya
content: The Nandyal District Collector instructed officials to take all necessary steps to ensure that the public and particularly those engaged in agricultural activities do not face any difficulties

title: Rahul Gandhi on two-day visit to Andaman and Nicobar Islands from April 26
content: Rahul Gandhi is expected to highlight concerns over the Centre's ambitious ₹81,000 crore Great Nicobar Holistic Development Project

title: BJP says Kejriwal spent private money on ‘Sheesh Mahal 2’; AAP calls allegation ‘fake’
content: Refuting the allegations, the former Delhi CM and AAP leader Atishi said the photographs released by Parvesh Verma were fake

title: It was unwarranted to quote and drag me for unpublished book: Ex-Army chief Naravane
content: In February this year, Congress leader Rahul Gandhi was stopped from citing excerpts from the memoir in the Lok Sabha, as it had not yet been published

title: A moment of glory turns into grief for this Karnataka topper
content: Divyanshu Saxena was one of the 22 gold medallists at the 10th convocation of the Central University of Karnataka in Kalaburagi

title: Coast Guard chopper over Sabarimala: Police report flags security breach
content: According to the report, the helicopter flew directly above the temple’s flagpole, which is a high-security zone, and the explanation provided by the Coast Guard citing weather issues was not satisfactory

title: ‘Victim is Dalit, poor every time’: Rahul Gandhi demands probe into Ghazipur rape-murder
content: Rahul Gandhi said in a country and State where parents have to beg even to get an FIR filed for their daughter, the country's government has no moral right to remain in power

title: Jadavpur University got global acclaim despite fiscal crunch: Teachers’ body on PM’s critical remark
content: The Jadavpur University Teachers' Association (JUTA) highlighted that, alongside academics and research, the institute has played a significant role in advancing social justice.

title: ‘Janivara’ row: BJP demands stern action
content: Ashok alleged that the CET authorities were behaving in an insensitive manner as they were of the view that the present Congress dispensation, led by Chief Minister Siddaramaiah, would be happy if they ask the students remove the ‘janivara’

title: Allahabad HC raps U.P. police for ‘disturbing trend’ of harassing young couples
content: The bench directed the State DGP to take corrective steps to address practices where police chase young couples who have married out of their own will

title: Advocates boycott court proceedings in Tiruvannamalai, demanding air-conditioned halls
content: Unaware of the boycott of courts by law practitioners, several litigants visited the court from faraway remote villages in the district

title: Kavitha floats ‘Telangana Rashtra Sena’, targets KCR and BRS
content: By naming her political outfit as TRS, she apparently wants to be seen as a symbolic attempt to reclaim the ideological legacy of the Telangana statehood movement

title: Thane court acquits man accused of raping minor, says relationship appeared consensual
content: Special judge S.P. Agarwal cleared the accused, Samsher Rais Khan, of charges under section 376(2)(n) (repeated rape) of the Indian Penal Code and relevant provisions of the Protection of Children from Sexual Offences (POCSO) Act

title: AAP MPs walk out, casting shadow over 2027 Assembly polls in Punjab
content: The defection in AAP has exposed the party’s infighting and the crises it’s plagued with, which opposition parties immediately took advantage of following the defection

title: Chadha, others wouldn't have left AAP had it followed 'right' path: Anna Hazare
content: "Everyone has the right to hold an opinion in a democracy. They [Mr. Chadha and others] must have faced some trouble, which is why they left," Mr. Hazare

title: Denial of bail to MP Rashid to meet ailing father ‘nothing short of inhuman’, says brother
content: “This is not just about one individual, but the story of hundreds of Kashmiris in jails, and it is about the conscience of a system that must answer for its fairness and humanity”

title: Olympic medallist Gurbax Singh Grewal dead
content: Grewal, who was part of the Indian team that secured a bronze medal at the 1968 Mexico City Olympics, died on April 24

title: Absolute voter increases seen across Tamil Nadu followed spatial patterns
content: Data show the record turnout in the southern State was a consequence of the SIR exercise; while the State also registered an increase in the absolute number of voters who turned out, the provisional addition of roughly 24.8 lakh voters appears lower than the gains registered in recent cycles

title: RTC strike called off after marathon talks lead to common ground between govt and unions
content: The TGSRTC workers’ strike had thrown travel plans of nearly 65 lakh daily passengers in a state of disarray

title: Atrocities against women in U.P. reached peak under BJP rule, says Priyanka Gandhi
content: The Congress General Secretary was reacting to the murder of a girl in Ghazipur, which has led to an uproar and protests

title: Sharpen the anti-defection law, strengthen democracy
content: The anti-defection law has played a crucial role in political stability, but there are gaps which need to be addressed to make it more effective and impartial

title: ECI orders suspension of five police officers in West Bengal for 'serious misconduct' during polls
content: In a communication to the State Chief Secretary, the poll panel said the action followed a report submitted by the Chief Electoral Officer (CEO) of West Bengal about the conduct of police personnel.

title: For snakebite management, training crucial for doctors to administer antivenom: experts
content: Antivenom administration can trigger adverse reactions in the patient, which taluk hospitals may not be equipped to handle. However, antivenom should not be withheld as complications due to snakebites are a far greater risk than adverse reactions, experts say, stressing the need for proper training

title: Justice will prevail over politics of threat, intimidation: Congress stands behind Pawan Khera
content: We are confident that justice will prevail over the politics of threat, intimidation, and harassment, says Congress leader Jairam Ramesh

title: Quiet Tarluvada readies for Google AI data centre
content: Nestled in Anandapuram mandal outside Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation limits, the hamlet will host Google’s first hyperscale 1 GW AI data centre outside the United States; the foundation stone is to be laid on April 28.

title: Congress stands with Pawan Khera, we will not be intimidated: Rahul
content: Assam government has moved the Supreme Court challenging the transit anticipatory bail to Pawan Khera

title: Sholinganallur registers a massive jump in voter turnout compared to previous Assembly election
content: While the constituency registered a turnout of 55% in 2021, this year, the provisional figures released by election authorities stood at around 80.4%

title: A muted start to Thrissur Pooram festivities after the Mundathikode blast
content: Sample fireworks scheduled for the day cancelled. Scale of celebrations curtailed, illumination of pandals restricted to main Pooram days. Thiruvambady observes 3-day mourning.

title: Mamata to become West Bengal Chief Minister for fourth consecutive term: Tejashwi
content: The RJD leader attended back-to-back roadshows in Jagaddal, Bhatpara and Khardaha Assembly constituencies

title: Congress leaders introspect on not aligning with TVK
content: Many have said Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, who did not share the stage with Chief Minister M.K. Stalin and was widely believed to have favoured an alliance with the TVK, had assessed the situation accurately when he saw an opportunity to rejuvenate the Congress in Tamil Nadu

title: 13 women rescued in raid at orchestra bar in Bhayandar
content: "The raid was conducted around midnight following inputs that the bar management was employing more women than permitted and forcing them to perform obscene dances to attract customers," says official

title: TCS Nashik case highlights gaps in PoSH reporting and implementation | Data
content: Beyond data gaps, fear for reputation, lack of trust in authorities and unclear procedures continue to prevent women from reporting sexual harassment

title: SC/ST Commission recommends action against officials for non-removal of caste from name of ward in Srivilliputhur constituency
content: Residents of the area boycotted the election to protest the government’s failure to remove the caste name

title: What Telangana’s survey shows about caste inequality
content: When caste is measured, the gap is not incremental but exponential, with SC and ST households structurally locked in despite economic growth

title: How is ethanol used in Sustainable Aviation Fuel?
content: Since ATJ prevents raw ethanol from running through jet engines, it will not reduce thrust or clog fuel lines by absorbing moisture

title: DRI seizes 70 tonnes of firecrackers at Nhava Sheva; two arrested
content: The accused had attempted to move the firecrackers from the imported containers to another vehicle at a Container Freight Station after breaking the container seals

title: YouTuber, who changed identity, arrested for killing boy 31 years ago
content: A prominent YouTuber and social activist, Salim Wastik, has been arrested by Delhi Police for a 1995 kidnapping and murder. Previously known as Salim Khan, he had been on the run for 26 years after escaping interim bail.  His newfound fame as a vocal critic of Islam ultimately led to his capture, bringing a decades-old cold case to a close.

title: 'Their fault': Anna Hazare holds AAP responsible for Raghav Chadha, 6 others joining BJP
content: Veteran activist Anna Hazare criticized AAP leadership following the departure of Raghav Chadha and six other Rajya Sabha MPs, suggesting their exit stemmed from the party deviating from its original principles. Chadha announced the group's decision to merge with the BJP, citing constitutional provisions and claiming a significant portion of AAP's Rajya Sabha members had left.

title: ‘Made Rs 80L to 1Cr’ off slapgate: Sreesanth ends all ties with Harbhajan
content: S Sreesanth has cut ties with Harbhajan Singh after the IPL slapgate row resurfaced. Upset over an ad linked to the incident, he said, "I'll forgive but I'll never forget." Sreesanth added, "I have no relationship with that person," blocked him on social media, and called his public image “an act”.

title: Google to invest up to $40bn in Anthropic; $10bn now, rest tied to performance targets
content: Tech giants Google and Amazon are injecting billions into AI startup Anthropic, recognizing its rapidly growing influence, particularly with its Claude Code product. This strategic investment secures substantial computing power for Anthropic, while also creating a symbiotic relationship where Anthropic becomes a major customer for Google and Amazon's cloud services and hardware.

title: Raghav Chadha-led exodus jolts AAP; party races to recalibrate strategy: What next?
content: Seven Aam Aadmi Party MPs, including Raghav Chadha, defected to the Bharatiya Janata Party, citing a deviation from the party's core principles. The move is permissible under the anti-defection law as it involves more than two-thirds of the AAP's Rajya Sabha members. AAP plans to seek disqualification for some MPs.

title: PCB chief Mohsin Naqvi confirms spectators for PSL 2026 final in Lahore
content: Pakistan Cricket Board chairman Mohsin Naqvi confirmed that fans will be allowed to attend the Pakistan Super League (PSL) 2026 final in Lahore on May 3, following approval from Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif. This decision comes after earlier matches were played behind closed doors due to fuel price concerns and government-advised austerity measures.

title: BJP shares 'Sheeshmahal 2' pics; AAP calls them 'fake', asks Delhi CM to show her house
content: Bharatiya Janata Party has sharply criticized Arvind Kejriwal, labeling him the "Rahman Dakait of Delhi" and accusing him of lavish living. BJP leader Parvesh Verma alleged Kejriwal built a "Sheesh Mahal 2" while Delhi suffered during the Covid wave and has now moved into a luxurious bungalow, abandoning his image of simplicity.

title: KPMG to lay off 10% of US audit team after failed retirement efforts
content: KPMG is set to cut approximately 10% of its US audit partners after voluntary retirement schemes failed to yield desired results. The accounting giant, one of the Big Four, cited a need to align its partnership size with current business demands.

title: 'Only revealed Sangh’s true nature': Rahul targets RSS after Ram Madhav’s Russia-Iran oil remarks
content: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi seized upon remarks by RSS leader Ram Madhav to criticize Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Madhav's initial comments suggested India yielded to US pressure on oil imports and tariffs, which he later retracted and apologized for. Congress claims this indicates Modi has lost his authority and India's sovereignty is compromised.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office day 38: Film slowly inches towards Rs 1800 cr worldwide
content: In a stunning display of cinematic prowess, Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' has captivated audiences, amassing nearly Rs 1800 crore globally. Surpassing the Rs 1700 crore mark, it now stands as the third highest-grossing Indian film. By its sixth week, it continues to fend off stiff competition, raking in remarkable box office figures both at home and abroad. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Starting January 1, Deloitte cuts parental leave, PTO, pension, IVF funding in US
content: Deloitte plans to reduce paid family leave from 16 to eight weeks and cut annual paid time off by 5-10 days for a segment of its US workforce starting January 1, 2027. These changes, affecting internal roles under the 'Center' talent model, aim to tailor benefits to market alignment. New pension plan contributions and adoption/surrogacy reimbursements will also cease.

title: 4 girlfriends, 12-page death note: How Bengaluru techie allegedly drove fiance to suicide
content: A 26-year-old woman in Kadapa district died by suicide after her fiancé allegedly pressured her to call off their wedding. The techie reportedly confessed to having multiple girlfriends and disliking the deceased, pushing her into depression. Police have arrested the fiancé and his parents for abetment to suicide.

title: Russia accuses US of energy grab, says Iran, Venezuela actions 'about oil'
content: Russia's foreign minister Sergei Lavrov has accused the US of prioritizing oil and energy dominance, alleging military actions in Iran and Venezuela are resource-driven. He claims Washington disregards international law, opting for power over rules. Lavrov urged the US towards dialogue, criticizing policy shifts that strain relations and push Europe away from Russian gas, likening it to a 'colonial era'.

title: Sooryavanshi switches to MS Dhoni mode ahead of SRH clash - Watch
content: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi impressed with a helicopter shot in a Rajasthan Royals net session, sparking viral attention.  In IPL 2026, the 15-year-old prodigy continues his aggressive form, recently becoming the fastest to 500 IPL runs, though he faced a rare setback with a low score and maiden over.

title: 'Bhai ye kya tamasha hai?': PSL faces troll storm after 'Mascot fight'
content: A pre-match mascot scuffle at the Pakistan Super League's Karachi Kings vs. Lahore Qalandars clash sparked amusement and debate. Captains Warner and Afridi were seen laughing as commentator Ramiz Raja provided hilarious, witty commentary, even joking about the rivalry. While some fans found the staged act unnecessary, others enjoyed the light-hearted build-up.

title: Nvidia tops $5 trillion market cap as AI rally lifts chip stocks
content: Nvidia's stock hit a record high, surpassing $5 trillion in market value, driven by immense investor confidence in artificial intelligence chips.  This surge follows strong performance from other chipmakers and a broader tech sector rebound, despite earlier concerns.  With AI demand showing no signs of slowing, Nvidia remains a key player in the global race.

title: Telangana Rashtra Sena (TRS): K Kavitha launches new party 7 months after parting ways with BRS
content: K Kavitha, daughter of former Telangana CM K Chandrashekar Rao, launched a new political outfit, Telangana Rashtra Sena (TRS), in Hyderabad. She stated the BRS party deviated from its core Telangana aspirations. Kavitha, who claims expulsion from BRS, emphasized her commitment to the state's development and people, viewing them as her family.

title: Rajpal Yadav says he ‘won’t go in for a settlement’ in the cheque bounce case
content: Rajpal Yadav clarified his cheque bounce case, stating it wasn't about an inability to pay Rs 5 crore but a larger issue that cost him Rs 22 crore. He incurred significant losses due to the lender jeopardizing his film's release and distribution, leading him to vow to fight the case indefinitely rather than settle.

title: IPL: KL Rahul poised to overtake MS Dhoni, need 13 runs to...
content: KL Rahul is on the cusp of a significant IPL milestone. He requires just 13 runs in tonight's match to overtake MS Dhoni in the all-time run-scorers list. Rahul has shown a more aggressive batting approach this season. Surpassing Dhoni will place him sixth in IPL history. His next target will be Suresh Raina.

title: Is Iran running out of options? Secret letter to Khamenei flags cracks in 'resistance' strategy
content: A secret letter from senior Iranian officials warning of economic collapse and urging nuclear negotiations with the US has reportedly exposed deep divisions within Tehran's leadership. Despite public displays of unity and denials of internal strife, the leak has sparked a political firestorm, with legal threats issued against those who disclosed the classified document.

title: Should Ajit Agarkar continue till 2027 World Cup? BCCI weighs in
content: ​At a time when Indian cricket is scaling new heights on the global stage, vice-president of the Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI), Rajeev Shukla, shares insights into the system driving this sustained success. ​​In a conversation with Fazal Khan, Shukla speaks about the depth of India’s talent pool, the role of structured domestic platforms, and the impact of leagues like the IPL.

title: ‘Insult to police’: Cop’s granddaughter seeks FIR against woman who yelled at BJP minister in Mumbai
content: Zen Sadavarte, daughter of a former Bigg Boss contestant, has filed a complaint seeking an FIR against a woman who confronted Maharashtra minister Girish Mahajan during a rally. The woman had protested a traffic jam caused by the event, alleging inconvenience. Zen's complaint cites obstruction of duty and inciting panic.

title: Sinking ship? AAP’s 2022 strategists who cracked 'Punjab code' out ahead of crucial 2027 battle
content: The exit of seven AAP Rajya Sabha MPs, including strategists Sandeep Pathak and Raghav Chadha, marks a symbolic blow to the party in Punjab ahead of the 2027 assembly elections. While their operational influence had already diminished, their departure is seen as a psychological setback, with the BJP likely to leverage the defections to portray AAP as a 'sinking ship'.

title: Fastest growing startup to implosion: Future tense for AAP as Raghav Chadha leads RS exodus
content: Aam Aadmi Party faces a significant internal crisis as Rajya Sabha MP Raghav Chadha leads a mass exodus of seven MPs to the Bharatiya Janata Party. This move, following Chadha's removal as deputy leader, marks a severe blow to AAP's presence in Parliament and raises questions about its core principles.

title: Cristiano Ronaldo diet secret: Ex-chef reveals why he avoids milk
content: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef has revealed that the forward has completely avoided milk as part of his diet, despite its widespread use in sports nutrition. The insight offers a rare look into the specific choices behind his routine, highlighting a preference for natural foods and strict control over intake, which has supported his longevity at the highest level.‘It’s against nature’: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef reveals why he avoids and never drinks milk, shares daily diet details

title: Patrick Mahomes $325 million valuation shock: Off-field move amid recovery
content: Patrick Mahomes, the Kansas City Chiefs’ quarterback, is focused on his recovery from his brutal injuries as his wife, Brittany Mahomes stands by his side through all the difficult times. While both Patrick Mahomes and his wife, Brittany Mahomes, have preferred to be private about the star player’s recovery, the high profile couple recently received an update worth a whopping $325 million.

title: Dianna Russini claim shocks: Alleged confession rocks Mike Vrabel saga
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down as new details emerge. Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.

title: How Shreyas’s form fueling his rise in India’s T20I leadership scheme
content: In the past few years, since embracing the demands of captaincy, Iyer has not only shown how able a leader he can be, but also as a batter who has dominated seasons while balancing the dual roles of anchor and aggressor.

title: Delhi IRS officer daughter’s rape-murder: Accused addicted to online games, had violent past
content: An IRS officer's daughter was brutally murdered by a former domestic help, Rahu, who exhibited psychopathic tendencies and a history of aggression. Investigations reveal his addiction to online betting led to significant financial losses, driving the crime. Rahul used his knowledge of the victim's home to gain entry, commit the heinous act, and attempt to steal cash.

title: Netanyahu accuses Hezbollah of 'sabotaging' Lebanon peace push
content: Israel and Lebanon have extended a three-week ceasefire, with Prime Minister Netanyahu aiming for "historic peace" and crediting US pressure on Iran. Despite the truce, Hezbollah dismisses it as "meaningless" amid ongoing Israeli military actions and retaliatory clashes.  This fragile calm persists amidst wider regional tensions, leaving lasting agreement prospects uncertain.

title: EC suspends five cops for alleged misconduct during Bengal assembly elections
content: Five police officers in Diamond Harbour have been suspended by the Election Commission for alleged misconduct and failing to remain neutral during the Bengal assembly elections. The commission has also warned the Superintendent of Police for not ensuring discipline among her team.

title: When Harbhajan and Zaheer threw Sachin Tendulkar into a Jacuzzi
content: ​It was a balmy Friday in Mumbai, and the CK Nayudu Hall at the Brabourne Stadium got warmer with emotion as members of the Legends Club congregated to celebrate Sachin Tendulkar’s 53rd birthday.

title: Gujarat woman critical after shooting at US store; husband held for ‘accidental’ firing
content: A Gujarat woman's life in Louisiana was shattered by a gunshot during a store negotiation, leaving her critically injured with severe jaw damage. Her husband faces weapon charges as doctors deem her recovery complex, requiring multiple surgeries. A crowdfunding effort is underway to support her extensive medical bills and her dream of a better future.

title: 'Virat Kohli isn't a natural six-hitter but ... ': Kaif after RCB's win over GT
content: Mohammad Kaif praised Virat Kohli for crossing 300 IPL sixes, saying, "Kohli isn't a natural six-hitter but he worked on his game…" highlighting his adaptability. Kohli (81) and Devdutt Padikkal (55) then led RCB’s chase of 206. Kohli said, "His innings was the difference…" as their partnership sealed victory over GT.

title: US sanctions China's 'teapot' refinery & 40 shipping companies over Iran oil trade
content: The US has tightened its grip on Iran's oil revenue by sanctioning a major Chinese refinery and numerous shipping entities involved in transporting Iranian crude. This move targets a "shadow network" and escalates pressure amid regional tensions. China has criticized the sanctions, urging an end to their political use and warning of harm to legitimate trade.

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: 2nd Round Of Talks In Pakistan Today, Commercial Flights Resume In Tehran
content: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: The standoff between the US and Iran has effectively choked off nearly all exports through the strait -- where 20 per cent of the world's traded oil passes in peacetime -- with no end in sight.

title: "Would Not Have Left If...": Anna Hazare As Raghav Chadha, 6 MPs Quit AAP
content: Raghav Chadha announced that he would join the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) along with six other AAP MPs

title: US, Iran To Hold 2nd Round Of Talks In Pakistan Today. What's On Agenda?
content: While US President Donald Trump is sending envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, state-run IRNA news agency said Iran will be represented by Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi.

title: YouTuber 'Ex-Muslim' Who Changed His Name After Killing Boy In 1995 Arrested
content: Saleem Wastik, who had been living under a false identity, has been sentenced to life imprisonment at the Tihar jail on charges of kidnapping, extortion, and murder.

title: Man Walks Calmly Among Mexican Ruins, Then Opens Fire Killing Tourist
content: The attacker has been identified as 27-year-old Mexican national Julio César Jasso Ramírez who was obsessed with Adolf Hitler.

content: NDTV Yuva 2026: The event will feature several key speakers who have left their mark in politics, sports, entertainment, and social impact.

title: Bhagwant Mann's "Sabzi" Post After Raghav Chadha's Move, BJP's "Insult" Jibe
content: Bhagwant Mann's post came a day after Raghav Chadha announced that he would join the BJP along with six other AAP MPs.

title: 6 Detained After Protests Over Sexual Harassment Allegation In J&K
content: Student protests erupted in Sopore after a student of a girls' higher secondary school alleged harassment by a teacher on April 13.

title: NDTV Yuva 2026 - "Anybody Is Welcome": Rajyavardhan Rathore On Raghav Chadha's Big Move
content: Referring to Raghav Chadha leaving the AAP and joining the BJP, Rajyavardhan Singh Rathore said people are slowly realising what's good and seeing the right path now

title: Cops Make 1st Arrest Months After Akshay Kumar's Daughter Asked For 'Nudes'
content: Akshay Kumar said that his 13-year-old daughter was asked to send nude pictures by another user on an online gaming app.

title: 'Failed To Maintain Neutrality During Polls': 5 Bengal Cops Suspended
content: The officers to be suspended are Additional Superintendent of Police Sandip Garai, SDPO Sajal Mondal, Diamond Harbour police station's inspector-in-charge Mausam Chakraborty, Falta police station inspector-in-charge Ajay Bag and Usthi police station

title: 34 Injuries Found On Border Force Cop Who Died In Anti-Drugs Agency Custody
content: Jaswinder Singh died after his health deteriorated during questioning by the NCB in Amritsar, Punjab, the police had said in March

title: Months After BRS Exit, K Kavitha Launches New Party, Names It TRS
content: Surrounded by a sea of supporters, Kavita unveiled the party's name, flag and agenda at a private venue in Munirabad in Medchal district.

title: Record 85.15% Turnout Rewrites Tamil Nadu's Electoral Map, West Surges, South Lags
content: Western Tamil Nadu emerged as the standout performer, with Karur (92.63%), Salem (90.76%) and Namakkal (90.21%) leading the charts.

title: House Help Crisis Grips Gurugram As Bengal Migrants Return Home To Vote
content: The residents are now compelled to sweep, mop, wash dishes, and do the laundry on their own, in what has added to their already hectic office hours.

title: AAP MP Hosted Arvind Kejriwal For A Year, Quit Party Hours After He Moved Out
content: On April 24, Kejriwal moved out of Mittal's house and shifted into the type-VII government bungalow in Lodhi Estate - the residence allotted to him by the Centre.

title: In Nashik TCS Case, An 'Intoxicating' Sheer Khurma And A Face Scan Hurdle
content: The accused allegedly exploited his personal family grievances and mental distress to suggest "black magic" as a spiritual solution.

title: Rajya Sabha numbers game: AAP exodus pushes NDA 17 seats past majority
content: seven of the 10 Rajya Sabha MPs of AAP, including Raghav Chadha and ex-international cricketer Harbhajan Singh, joined BJP on friday . this comes at a time when former CM Arvind Kejriwal has intensified his campaign against BJP after his discharge in the excise policy case .

title: 'Our Ganga is clean… can he dip in Delhi’s Yamuna?' Mamata targets PM over Hooghly boat ride
